headline: US Has More Natural Gas Than It Can Use as War Chokes Global Supply
summary: (Bloomberg) -- As the Iran war strangles natural gas supplies, countries across Asia and Africa are rationing fuel and enduring blackouts. headline: Is EQT (EQT) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Volatility?
summary: Wondering if EQT at around US$59 is offering fair value or a potential bargain? This article walks through the key numbers so you can judge the price with more confidence. The stock has returned 4.3% over the last week, while the 30 day return sits at a 12.0% decline and the 1 year return at 17.4%, with very large gains over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on EQT's position in US energy production and how investor sentiment has shifted around the sector's prospects. This context helps...
